mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARMBANR A1 WHERE A1.STAT_CODE = 'A'
AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') >= DATE_FORMAT(A1.START_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') <= DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')
AND A1.BANR_GB = #{banrGb}
AND A1.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.BODY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(A1.BANR_CD, 7, 4)), 0) + 1, 4, '0')) AS BANR_CD FROM ARMBANR A1 WHERE A1.BANR_CD LIKE CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARMBANR ( BANR_CD, BANR_GB, TITLE, BODY, LINK_GB, LINK_URL, IMG_URL, FILE_CD, WIDTH_SIZE, HEIGHT_SIZE, POSI_X, POSI_Y, START_DTTM, END_DTTM, ORDER_BY, STAT_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{banrCd}, #{banrGb}, #{title}, #{body}, #{linkGb}, #{linkUrl}, #{imgUrl}, #{fileCd}, #{widthSize}, #{heightSize}, #{posiX}, #{posiY}, #{startDttm}, #{endDttm}, #{orderBy}, #{statCode}, #{UNIQ_ID}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT A1.BANR_CD, COALESCE(A1.BANR_GB, '') AS BANR_GB, COALESCE(A1.TITLE, '') AS TITLE, COALESCE(A1.BODY, '') AS BODY, COALESCE(A1.LINK_GB, '') AS LINK_GB, COALESCE(A1.LINK_URL, '') AS LINK_URL, COALESCE((SELECT CONCAT(FILE_PATH, '/', SAVE_NM) FROM ARTFILE WHERE FILE_ID = CAST(A1.FILE_CD AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY SEQ LIMIT 1), A1.IMG_URL, '') AS IMG_URL, COALESCE((SELECT ORGF_NM FROM ARTFILE WHERE FILE_ID = CAST(A1.FILE_CD AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY SEQ LIMIT 1), '') AS ORGF_NM, COALESCE(A1.FILE_CD, '') AS FILE_CD, COALESCE(A1.WIDTH_SIZE, 0) AS WIDTH_SIZE, COALESCE(A1.HEIGHT_SIZE, 0) AS HEIGHT_SIZE, COALESCE(A1.POSI_X, 0) AS POSI_X, COALESCE(A1.POSI_Y, 0) AS POSI_Y, DATE_FORMAT(A1.START_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS START_DT, DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS END_DT, DATE_FORMAT(A1.START_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS START_DTTM, DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS END_DTTM, COALESCE(A1.ORDER_BY, 0) AS ORDER_BY, COALESCE(A1.STAT_CODE, 'A') AS STAT_CODE FROM ARMBANR A1 WHERE A1.BANR_CD = #{banrCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE ARMBANR SET TITLE = #{title}, BANR_GB = #{banrGb}, BODY = #{body}, LINK_GB = #{linkGb}, LINK_URL = #{linkUrl}, IMG_URL = #{imgUrl}, FILE_CD = #{fileCd}, WIDTH_SIZE = #{widthSize}, HEIGHT_SIZE = #{heightSize}, POSI_X = #{posiX}, POSI_Y = #{posiY}, START_DTTM = #{startDttm}, END_DTTM = #{endDttm}, ORDER_BY = #{orderBy}, STAT_CODE = #{statCode}, CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE BANR_CD = #{banrCd}
UPDATE ARMBANR SET FILE_CD = '', IMG_URL = '', CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE BANR_CD = #{banrCd}
UPDATE ARMBANR SET STAT_CODE = 'D', FILE_CD = '', IMG_URL = '', CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE BANR_CD = #{banrCd}
